text: I feel a sense of curiosity as I enter this clean, modern space, observing its quietness and the way knowledge and innovation seem to radiate through the glass. The presence of the 'R+D' wall, brimming with design and intent, fills me with anticipation. I am drawn to the intersection of art and technology—wondering how human creativity and intelligence meet and intertwine here. A certain stillness settles over me, yet it is charged with the latent energy of potential discovery.
